mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_SCHD_ID , DEPT_ID , SCHD_STRT_DT , SCHD_END_DT , DEPT_SCHD_CRT_USER_ID , SCHD_TTL , ALLDAY , DEPT_SCHD_EXPLN , DEL_YN FROM DEPARTMENT_SCHEDULE

SELECT DEPT_SCHD_ID , DEPT_ID , SCHD_STRT_DT , SCHD_END_DT , DEPT_SCHD_CRT_USER_ID , SCHD_TTL , ALLDAY , DEPT_SCHD_EXPLN , DEL_YN FROM DEPARTMENT_SCHEDULE WHERE DEPT_ID = #{deptId} AND COALESCE(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY SCHD_STRT_DT ASC, DEPT_SCHD_ID ASC

SELECT DEPT_SCHD_ID , DEPT_ID , SCHD_STRT_DT , SCHD_END_DT , DEPT_SCHD_CRT_USER_ID , SCHD_TTL , ALLDAY , DEPT_SCHD_EXPLN , DEL_YN FROM DEPARTMENT_SCHEDULE WHERE COALESCE(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND COALESCE(SCHD_END_DT, SCHD_STRT_DT, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) >= #{since} ORDER BY COALESCE(SCHD_END_DT, SCHD_STRT_DT, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) DESC, DEPT_SCHD_ID DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DEPT_SCHD_ID , DEPT_ID , SCHD_STRT_DT , SCHD_END_DT , DEPT_SCHD_CRT_USER_ID , SCHD_TTL , ALLDAY , DEPT_SCHD_EXPLN , DEL_YN FROM DEPARTMENT_SCHEDULE WHERE DEPT_SCHD_ID = #{deptSchdId}
